characters.appearance: Male in his 20s or 30s with a medium build and light brown complexion. He has short dark hair, a mustache, and a goatee. He has visible tattoos on his arms and neck.

characters.demeanor: Confident, educational, and expressive, using frequent hand gestures to emphasize his points.

characters.appearance: Male in his 20s or 30s with a medium build and light brown complexion. He has a mustache and goatee.
characters.wardrobe: He wears a tan short-sleeve button-down work shirt over a white t-shirt, and a dark baseball cap.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: English बोलना सीखना है? तो ये 3 गलतियां कभी मत करना। [Want to learn to speak English? Then never make these 3 mistakes.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing a common goal (learning English).
- Sets up a numbered list format to keep retention high.
- Establishes the presenter as a knowledgeable, relatable guide.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Top 3 Mistakes
1.
2.
3.
❗️How NOT to Learn English❗️

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: पहला, सिर्फ grammar rules रटना। [First, just cramming grammar rules.] Character A says: Rules से vocabulary तो बढ़ेगी, लेकिन जब बोलने की बारी आएगी, तो आप blank हो जाओगे। [Rules will increase vocabulary, but when it's time to speak, you'll go blank.] Character A says: दूसरा, 'perfect' होने का wait करना। [Second, waiting to be 'perfect'.] Character A says: English बोलने के लिए ready नहीं होना है, ready होने के लिए बोलना है। [You don't get ready to speak English, you speak to get ready.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Identifies common pitfalls for Indian learners (focusing too much on grammar and fear of making mistakes).
- Validates the learner's struggle of going 'blank' during conversations.
- Delivers a memorable, encouraging piece of advice about speaking to get ready.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Top 3 Mistakes
1. सिर्फ Grammar रटना
2. 'Perfect' होने का wait करना
3.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: और तीसरा, real conversation से डरना। [And third, fearing real conversations.] Character A says: जब तक आप खुलकर बोलोगे नहीं, fluency कैसे आएगी? [Until you speak openly, how will fluency come?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the final mistake, highlighting the core problem of avoiding actual speaking practice.
- Uses the PIP visual of the struggling learner to create empathy and relatability.
- Sets up the transition to the solution.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Top 3 Mistakes
1. सिर्फ Grammar रटना
2. 'Perfect' होने का wait करना
3. Real conversation से डरना

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: इसीलिए Supernova app बना है। [That's why the Supernova app was made.] Character A says: यहाँ आप AI tutor के साथ interview या shopping जैसे real scenarios में English बोलने की practice कर सकते हो। [Here you can practice speaking English in real scenarios like interviews or shopping with an AI tutor.] Character A says: बिना किसी डर के। रोज़ practice करो, और confidence बढ़ाओ। [Without any fear. Practice daily, and build confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the practical solution to the problems discussed.
- Highlights key features: AI tutor, real-world scenarios (interviews, shopping), and a judgment-free environment.
- Ends with a strong, encouraging call to action focused on building confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Top 3 Mistakes
SUPERNOVA
1. सिर्फ Grammar रटना
2. 'Perfect' होने का wait करना
3. Real conversation से डरना

scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides a clear, uncluttered final screen.
- Reinforces brand recall with the Supernova name.
- Delivers a straightforward call to action to download the app.
